title: JD Edwards EnterpriseOne Demo Login
description: Oracle JD Edwards EnterpriseOne demo environment for testing. URL contains campaign tracking parameters from Steltix marketing email.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a user navigates to the JD Edwards demo URL, When the page loads, Then the login form should be displayed with username and password fields
Given valid demo credentials, When user submits login form, Then user should be redirected to E1Menu main application page
Given invalid credentials, When user submits login form, Then an error message should be displayed
Given the E1Menu page loads, When user views the navigation, Then the main menu items should be visible and accessible
